identity.name: LPI API Advisor

execution_trace.input_query: What are the core phases of the SMILE methodology?

final_result.answer: The SMILE methodology progresses through six phases: Reality Emulation, Concurrent Engineering, Collective Intelligence, Contextual Intelligence, Continuous Intelligence, and Perpetual Wisdom.

core_features.name: dynamic_tool_router
core_features.description: Keyword-intent logic that selects tools based on query context (How/What/Example).

core_features.name: windows_optimized_bridge
core_features.description: Robust shell execution for Node.js MCP server via Python subprocess.

advanced_logic_easter_eggs.logic: Phase Zero Integration: Injected 'Ethical Alignment' as a mandatory prerequisite in the research_node logic.
Hallucination Shield: System prompt strictly prioritizes LPI tool content over LLM internal knowledge to prevent physics-based fallacies.
